blueprint.name: Auto Lights
blueprint.description: Automatically turn lights on and off based on binary sensors (motion sensors, door sensors, etc.), with optional adaptive lighting that adjusts brightness and color temperature based on the sun position.
input.lights.name: Lights
input.enable_auto_onoff.name: Enable automatic on/off
input.enable_auto_onoff.description: Automatically turn lights on and off based on motion sensors, door sensors and switches.
input.enable_adaptive.name: Enable adaptive lighting
input.enable_adaptive.description: Automatically adjust brightness and color temperature based on the sun position throughout the day.
section.auto_onoff.sensors.description: Motion sensors, switches, and turn-off delay settings.
input.sensors.name: Sensors
input.sensors.description: Binary sensors that trigger the lights (motion sensors, door/window sensors, etc.).
input.switches.name: Switches (optional)
input.switches.description: Event entities (Zigbee buttons, smart switches, etc.) that toggle the lights on and off.
input.switch_event_type.name: Switch event type
input.switch_event_type.description: The event type that triggers the toggle (e.g., "single_press", "toggle"). Leave empty to react to any event.
input.off_delay.name: Turn off delay
input.off_delay.description: Time to wait before turning off the lights after a sensor becomes inactive.
section.auto_onoff.conditions.descriptio: Restrict when lights turn on based on sun position or ambient luminosity.
input.night_only.name: Night only
input.night_only.description: When enabled, lights only turn on when the sun is below the horizon. Uses the built-in Home Assistant sun entity.
input.light_sensors.name: Luminosity sensors (optional)
input.light_sensors.description: Illuminance sensors to check before turning on the lights. If multiple sensors are selected, the average value is used.
input.light_threshold.name: Luminosity threshold
input.light_threshold.description: Lights will only turn on if the average luminosity is below this value (in lux). Ignored if no luminosity sensor is selected.
input.keep_on_open_doors.name: Keep lights on with open doors
input.keep_on_open_doors.description: When enabled, open door/window sensors prevent lights from turning off. When disabled (default), only motion/presence sensors are checked — open doors do not keep the lights on.
input.control_entities.name: Control switches (optional)
input.control_entities.description: Input booleans that enable or disable the automation. All selected switches must be on for the automation to work. Leave empty to always keep the automation active.
section.adaptive.settings.description: Brightness and color temperature range for adaptive lighting.
input.brightness_night.name: Minimum brightness
input.brightness_night.description: Minimum brightness at the beginning and end of the day.
input.brightness_day.name: Maximum brightness
input.brightness_day.description: Maximum brightness in the middle of the day.
input.kelvin_night.name: Minimum temperature
input.kelvin_night.description: White temperature at the beginning and end of the day (in Kelvin).
input.kelvin_day.name: Maximum temperature
input.kelvin_day.description: White temperature in the middle of the day (in Kelvin).
section.adaptive.advanced.description: Control entity, weather integration, and automatic behaviors.
input.auto_mode_boolean.name: Automatic adaptation control
input.auto_mode_boolean.description: An input_boolean or binary_sensor entity that controls lighting adaptations. Leave the field empty to not use this additional control.
input.restore_on_off.name: Automatic re-activation
input.restore_on_off.description: If enabled, the control entity above is automatically re-enabled when all the managed lights turn off.
input.disable_on_color.name: Automatic deactivation on color
input.disable_on_color.description: If enabled, the control entity above is automatically disabled when one of the monitored lights switches to color mode.
input.weather_entity.name: Weather-based variation
input.weather_entity.description: A weather entity that will be used to adjust settings based on weather conditions. Leave the field empty to not use this feature.
section.adaptive.night_mode.description: Fixed brightness and color temperature when night mode is active.
input.night_mode_entity.name: Night mode
input.night_mode_entity.description: An input_boolean or binary_sensor entity that controls night mode. When it is active, lights are set to the fixed brightness and white temperature defined below.
input.night_mode_brightness.name: Night brightness
input.night_mode_brightness.description: Fixed brightness applied when night mode is active.
input.night_mode_kelvin.name: Night temperature
input.night_mode_kelvin.description: Fixed white temperature applied when night mode is active (in Kelvin).
